title: NotebookLM is now bigger than Gemini
summary: NotebookLM has exceeded Google Gemini in search interest. Its core strength lies in grounding answers to user-supplied documents across multiple formats, reducing hallucinations and prioritizing accuracy when sources are known and diverse in format.
